close_reason: Added doc note about 2048-bit key constraint and 256-byte signature length
description: The feature is named 'rsa-pss' and the type is named RsaPssSigner, but construction silently rejects anything other than RsaPss2048Sha256. A caller with a 4096-bit RSA-PSS backend will get an InvalidUri error at runtime with the message 'RsaPssSigner requires RsaPss2048Sha256 backend, got ...' — the constraint is invisible until then. Fix: either name the type RsaPss2048Signer, or add a # Constraints section to the type doc comment stating the key-size requirement.
title: RsaPssSigner key-size constraint not surfaced in name/docs
